entity.summary: South Korea-based centralized cryptocurrency exchange founded in July 2013 and continuing to provide digital-asset trading through the Korbit platform.
entity.notes: Official and independent company material places Korbit's founding in July 2013. The current official domain remains accessible and identifies Korbit as a Korean virtual-asset exchange.

expected.summary: South Korea-based centralized exchange launched in 2013 and still operating under the Korbit brand.

changes.summary: South Korea-based centralized cryptocurrency exchange founded in July 2013 and continuing to provide digital-asset trading through the Korbit platform.
changes.notes: Official and independent company material places Korbit's founding in July 2013. The current official domain remains accessible and identifies Korbit as a Korean virtual-asset exchange.

events.title: Korbit was founded in South Korea in July 2013
events.description: Korbit was founded in July 2013 as an early South Korean cryptocurrency exchange platform.
events.notes: The reviewed sources establish July 2013 but not an exact public launch day, so the first day of the month is used as a month-level marker.

evidence.title: Korbit company history
evidence.notes: Official company page presents Korbit's history beginning in 2013.

evidence.title: Korbit customer profile
evidence.notes: Independent company profile states that Korbit was established in July 2013.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange reference for Korbit
evidence.notes: Independent exchange profile corroborates the Korean identity and 2013 establishment year.

evidence.title: Korbit official exchange
evidence.notes: The official domain verifies the current Korbit identity and active exchange interface.
